stories.headline: Royal Mail bosses to be called to Parliament over letter delivery failures
stories.description: It comes after hundreds of people contacted BBC Your Voice to express frustration over late deliveries.

stories.headline: Israeli soldiers shot a Palestinian boy and stood around as he bled to death, video shows
stories.description: Israeli forces blocked Palestinian ambulances while a 14-year-old lay bleeding for at least 45 minutes.

stories.headline: UN approves first carbon credits under Paris Agreement market mechanism
stories.description: Paris Agreement’s carbon credits enable cross-border trade to support emissions reduction and climate goals worldwide.

stories.headline: Ocado to axe 1,000 jobs in cost-cutting drive
stories.description: Ocado cuts 1,000 jobs globally, with two-thirds of losses in the UK.

stories.headline: Near-blind Rohingya refugee dies after US agents left him far from home
stories.description: Nurul Amin Shah Alam, 56, was a nearly blind Rohingya refugee from Rakhine state in Myanmar, family members said.
